texto: Human life is a series of mistakes justified by reason
autor: there is no escape from it since the reason is the first mistake born out of a process subsequently understood as the very life by the very reason!
explicacao: Citação de there is no escape from it since the reason is the first mistake born out of a process subsequently understood as the very life by the very reason! sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Human life is a series of mistakes justified by reason” articula reflexao, thiruman-archunan, human em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
